scripts.build:pptx: bun run --filter '@betteroffice/pptx-i18n' build && bun run --filter '@betteroffice/pptx' build && bun run --filter '@betteroffice/pptx-react' build
scripts.build:xlsx: bun run --filter '@betteroffice/xlsx-i18n' build && bun run --filter '@betteroffice/xlsx' build && bun run --filter '@betteroffice/xlsx-react' build
scripts.build:packages: bun run build:xlsx && bun run build:docx && bun run build:pptx
scripts.test: bun run build:xlsx-wasm && bun run build:docx-wasm && bun test packages apps/web/app/api
scripts.rust:check: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test
scripts.publish:packages: bun run publish:crates && bun scripts/rewrite-workspace-deps.ts && changeset publish
scripts.release: bun run build:packages && bun run publish:packages
scripts.build:docx: bun run --filter '@betteroffice/docx-i18n' build && bun run --filter '@betteroffice/docx' build && bun run --filter '@betteroffice/docx-react' build
